response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid software engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TDD, testing, and polyglot development, but lacks the core mandatory requirements: no substantive C++ experience on Windows (only a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 writing C/C++ components), no SQL Server or Oracle experience (MongoDB and generic SQL only), and zero exposure to capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domains. The gap between the role's requirements and the candidate's profile is too wide to bridge.
strengths: Strong engineering fundamentals with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practice
Polyglot background (C/C++, Java, TypeScript, DLang) suggests adaptability
15+ years of professional development experience with senior/staff-level roles
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ experience (2014-2015), far short of the 5-10 years required
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database work centers on MongoDB
Zero experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domains

key_factors.factor: No fixed income or capital markets domain
